content: Wave 2 plan: schema additions for swap (offered_item_id, accepted_at, confirmations, denied_at)
Backend: signed JWT helper for email Accept/Deny/Confirm URLs (no login required)
Backend: POST /transactions for mode=swap (creates pending swap + sends swap_request email)
Backend: GET /transactions/{id}/confirm?role=lister|swapper&token= → on both confirmed: swap items, mark Keep, retire listings
Backend: POST /transactions for mode=donate + /complete fires donation_both
Frontend: SwapOfferModal — pick a closet item to offer; submit POST /transactions mode=swap
Frontend: ListingDetail buttons — Buy (PayPal) for sell, Swap for swap, Donate for donate
Frontend: minimal /transactions/{id}/landing page for Accept/Deny/Confirm follow-through after email click
Lint, smoke test, add markers, finish summary
